title: 2025930Db Jhy4458
summary:
Main
• Seasonal Headwinds as We Enter October - Despite relatively robust spot rates across all dry bulk segments, a note of caution for the near term is warranted. Historically, October has not been favorable for dry bulk spot rates, with the Baltic Dry Index, a broad measure of spot global dry bulk rates, declining in 9 of the last 10 Octobers. We believe this pattern stems from the historically strong September rates, which often give way to softer rates in the following month.
